{{Quote|But much like the diversionary raids at Gyndine and Duro that preceded the clash at Ebaq Nine.|[[Nas Choka]]|<ref name="The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force">''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''</ref>}}
The [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] '''raided''' on [[Yuuzhan Vong]]-occupied [[Gyndine/Legends|Gyndine]] in [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]]. The goal was to train new recruits in combat that the New Republic was sure to win, in preparation for a [[Battle of Ebaq|decisive major battle]] later on. The Yuuzhan Vong force was larger than [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Traest Kre'fey]] wanted to attack, but he still managed to completely destroy the enemy force.
